name: construction contractors managing 5-15 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects simultaneously, inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance causes project delays. We provide a scheduling system instead of manual logs and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of equipment maintenance leads to project delays.
